title: hieracium praecurrens subsp. subserratifolium
intro: Hieracium praecurrens subsp. subserratifolium is a subspecies of Hieracium, a genus of flowering plants in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is also known as Hawkweed, a term that refers to any plant in the Hieracium genus. Traditionally, Hieracium praecurrens subsp. subserratifolium has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and has been used to promote wound healing, soothe skin irritations, and support immune function.
